## SLIDE 3: Problem
**Type:** problem-slide

**Content:**
- Title: Why Phase 2 Still Matters
- Pain Points:
  - LATAM exceptions still require manual routing -> Impact: 18%
  - Merchant evidence arrives in multiple formats -> Impact: 12%
  - VIP disputes need faster escalation paths -> Impact: 9%
  - Reporting is still stitched together manually -> Impact: 7%
